title: peramium formosanum
intro: Peramium formosanum, also known as Formosan peramium, is a type of plant native to Taiwan, which belongs to the family of flowering plants in the genus Peramium. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. In traditional medicine, Formosan peramium is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin infections, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Formosan peramium include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
